nodes.label: LANDMARC RFID Indoor Localization System
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. An Indoor Localization Mechanism Using Active RFID Tag : IEEE International Conference on S.pdf
nodes.rationale: LANDMARC introduces reference tags to reduce the number of deployed RFID readers while maintaining localization accuracy; this trade-off lowers deployment cost.

nodes.label: RFID Reference Tag Concept
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. An Indoor Localization Mechanism Using Active RFID Tag : IEEE International Conference on S.pdf
nodes.rationale: Reference tags serve as known anchor points reducing expensive RFID reader deployment while enabling triangulation-based localization.
